# Summary

## Challenges

I met some challenges. During the crawling, i found that some pages (such as the section about Messi's honors) had complex structures and difficult to capture. Professor James suggested that i can use the large language models to  extract data. However, there were still some data that could not be capture. After getting the professor's permission, I manually organized the textual data and compiled it into CSV files.

## Future Work

The next steps I will focus on data cleaning for following analysis
